idea-plugin.name: YamlLens
idea-plugin.description:
YamlLens is an IntelliJ IDEA plugin that provides a visual viewer for YAML configuration files used in Spring Boot applications. With YamlLens, you can easily navigate through multiple configuration files and profiles, and quickly see the values of each property for each profile in a table format.

This plugin has been superseded by Spring Config Table

YamlLens has been integrated into Spring Config Table, which includes all YamlLens features plus many more capabilities:

  • Visual Table Editor — Master-Detail layout with grouped property list, search filter, and inline editing
  • YAML Lens — View multiple YAML files as a searchable property table (the feature you know and love)
  • YAML ↔ Markdown Migration — Convert YAML files to master Markdown and back
  • Auto-Generation — Automatically regenerates YAML files when master Markdown changes
  • Spring Metadata — Type detection and auto-completion

Please migrate to Spring Config Table for continued updates and new features.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.8 — Final Release

⚠️ YamlLens has been integrated into Spring Config Table.

Please migrate to Spring Config Table for continued updates and new features.

  • Fix: IntelliJ 2025.3.4 plugin archive extraction error
  • Improvement: Natural number ordering for property keys (e.g., item[2] before item[10])

1.0.7
-- Feature
--- add support intellij 2025.3.1.1
1.0.6
-- Feature
--- add support intellij 2025.1.3
1.0.5
-- Feature
--- add support intellij 2024.3.4
1.0.4
-- Feature
--- add support intellij 2024.2.1
1.0.2
-- Feature
--- add support intellij 2023.2.2
1.0.1
-- Feature
--- add export csv
--- add filter by property name
1.0.0
-- Initial release

action.description: Displays a table with the values of YAML properties
